status: Review proof; not promoted to production by default.
visualBrief: Original Sundog pixel-chibi favicon in an early-2000s forum-avatar vocabulary: oversized head, tiny shoulders, crisp pixels, spark eyes, and accessory-like halo glints.
referenceBoundary: Use the broad chibi/forum-avatar/pixel-art vocabulary only; do not copy Gaia Online assets, avatar parts, silhouettes, or palettes.

sourceMapping.face: The gold sun becomes the chibi face.
sourceMapping.halo: The 22 degree halo becomes the head/halo outline.
sourceMapping.parhelia: Left/right parhelia become side glints, reading like small avatar accessories.
sourceMapping.upperTangent: The upper tangent arc becomes a bright bang/headband gesture.
sourceMapping.parhelicBelt: The belt stays as a one-pixel horizontal signal line through the glints.

smallSizeRules.16px: Face, halo ring, eyes, and side glints only; shoulders are almost symbolic.
smallSizeRules.48px: Browser icon proof with the same hard-pixel construction.
smallSizeRules.512px: Nearest-neighbor preview for human review, not a production app icon.
